sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n73812" key="o(morroe/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὁμορρο-έω</orth>, Astrol., of signs of the zodiac, <sense id="n73812.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">rise together with,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τῇ Σελήνῃ</foreign> Serapioin <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Cat.Cod.Astr.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8(4).226</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
